reason: TEST_SPEC.md v1.0.1 (Round 2) fully addresses all 4 Round 1 gaps with no regressions. MEDIUM gap fixed: FR-08 cases 7-8 parametrize ids now match P2-DD-4 / ADR-07 FFmpegUnavailableError policy, with explicit backwards-compat note that FFmpegUnavailableError subclasses RuntimeError and ConversionError (preserving P1 TEST_INVENTORY.yaml L135-L145 'RuntimeError' wording). LOW gap 1 fixed: case 6 parametrize id now under test_fr_08_audio_converter (single 'con'). LOW gap 2 fixed: per-type counts verified at 33+18+6+10+9+2+1+3=82, with new per-FR Type subtotals column added to the Per-FR Test Count Reconciliation table and primary-vs-all-labels counting rule documented. LOW gap 3 fixed: explicit NFR-02 Deferral Note subsection added to Cross-Cutting, citing SAD.md §7 open_question and ADR.md gap #4, clarifying that LEXICON-min-size >= 50 and 12-canonical-mapping assertions are covered but NFR-02 corpus coverage is deferred to P3. All 82 test cases present (12+9+10+9+8+7+6+21), all 8 FRs covered, 7-Question Protocol applied Q1-Q7 to all FRs, 10 test function names preserved (with the documented case 6 typo fix + cases 7-8 reconciliation).
citations: TEST_SPEC.md FR-08 case 7 parametrize id 'missing_ffmpeg_raises_FFmpegUnavailableError' (Round 2 fix; was 'missing_ffmpeg_raises_RuntimeError' in Round 1)
TEST_SPEC.md FR-08 case 8 parametrize id 'missing_ffmpeg_message_contains_ffmpeg_unavailable_and_PATH' (Round 2 fix; was 'missing_ffmpeg_message_contains_ffmpeg_and_PATH' in Round 1)

TEST_SPEC.md FR-08 Sub-case coverage note: 'FFmpegUnavailableError is a subclass of RuntimeError (and also a subclass of ConversionError per ADR.md ADR-07), preserving backwards compatibility with the P1 TEST_INVENTORY.yaml L135-L145 raises RuntimeError wording'
TEST_SPEC.md FR-08 case 6 parametrize id 'byte_prefix_compare_first_1KB_after_round_trip' under test_fr_08_audio_converter (single 'con' typo fixed; was 'conconverter' in Round 1)
TEST_SPEC.md Cross-Cutting NFR-02 Deferral Note (Round 2 LOW gap 3 fix; cites SAD.md §7 open_question + ADR.md gap #4)

TEST_SPEC.md Per-FR Test Count Reconciliation table: Type subtotals column added (Round 2 LOW gap 2 fix); FR-01=10+2, FR-02=7+2, FR-03=9+1, FR-04=4+2+1+2, FR-05=5+2+1, FR-06=3+3+1, FR-07=5+1, FR-08=10+4+6+1 — all sum to 12+9+10+9+8+7+6+21=82
TEST_SPEC.md By Test Type table: happy_path=33, boundary=18, state_transition=6, error=10, validation=9, observability=2, performance=1, integration=3 — sum 33+18+6+10+9+2+1+3=82 (verified)

TEST_SPEC.md primary-vs-all-labels counting rule documented: per-FR Type column sums to 82 (one per case, primary label only); By Test Type table sums to 82 (each distinct label in multi-label case contributes +1)
TEST_SPEC.md FR-01 cases 1-12 (12 cases, 1 function test_fr_01_lexicon_coverage)
TEST_SPEC.md FR-02 cases 1-9 (9 cases, 1 function test_fr_02_ssml_tags)

SAD.md §3.8 P2-DD-4 (ffmpeg-missing policy, FFmpegUnavailableError -> HTTP 500)
